q:
We went for a picnic yesterday. We hoped to have a relaxed atmosphere there.
(Join the sentences, using 'in order to'.) 2026
a: We went for a picnic yesterday in order to have a relaxed atmosphere there.

q:
The boy goes to the gym regularly. He wants to keep his body in shape.
(Join the sentences, using 'in order to'.) 2026
a: The boy goes to the gym regularly in order to keep his body in shape.
